word: G4899 - συνεκλεκτός - syneklektós - soon-ek-lek-tos' - Elected together with

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Elected together with
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
elected or chosen (by God to eternal life)
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a compound of G4862 and G1586; chosen in company with, that is, co-elect (fellow Christian): - elected together with.
